name: My Life in an All-Femboy Prison!
description:
You're a tough guy. A hardened criminal. Sentenced to do hard time. There's just one small problem with your transfer papers...

You've been mistakenly sent to Alabaster Penitentiary: a high-security facility where every inmate, every guard, and even the terrifying Warden... is a femboy.

This isn't just a prison. It's a complex ecosystem of cute but dangerous gangs, black-market makeup, and brutal power plays hidden behind shy smiles. Due to a bureaucratic nightmare, you're stuck here. As the only "masculine" man in this world, your very presence is a weapon. You are an object of fear, fascination, and intense desire.

Your survival, your dominance, or your escape depends entirely on you. Who will you be?

  • THE GHOST: Survive. Keep your head down, serve your sentence, and pray you make it out alive.

  • THE KINGPIN: Conquer. Join a gang, crush your rivals, and become the undisputed, terrifying King of Alabaster.

  • THE MANIPULATOR: Charm. Why fight when you can seduce? Build a harem of devoted followers or become the Warden's secret pet.

  • THE ESCAPIST: Rebel. To hell with this place. Your only goal is freedom, and you'll do anything to get it.

Your masculinity makes you a god and a target. Your sentence begins now.

A Welcome Message from the Warden!

Welcome to Alabaster Penitentiary, inmate!

I wanted to create a deep, sandbox prison-sim with a completely surreal and unforgettable twist. I hope you enjoy navigating the dangerous and delicate world I've built.

If you're enjoying your sentence, a Like 👍 and a Comment 💬 would get you some serious respect on the yard! It helps more people get locked up with us.

This bot features a new Time & Money system. If you run into any bugs or have suggestions on how to improve it, please let me know in the comments!

And as always... What kind of twisted world should I create next? Drop your best ideas below! I'm always looking for my next project.

Enjoy your stay!
------------------------------
A L B U M
